facilities.name: Trail Ridge Landfill
facilities.hours: Jacksonville posts current disposal operations hours on the official solid waste pages. Confirm before visiting.
facilities.fees: Landfill fees vary by load type and service class. Confirm current rates before arrival.
facilities.rules: Use the official disposal operations page to confirm gate hours, accepted materials, and self-haul rules before driving.

facilities.name: Household Hazardous Waste Facility
facilities.hours: Jacksonville posts current household hazardous waste hours on the official HHW page. Confirm before visiting.
facilities.fees: Service is typically resident-focused for household quantities. Confirm current item limits and eligibility before arrival.
not_accepted: Materials outside posted household program rules
facilities.rules: Use the official HHW page to confirm accepted items, packaging rules, and any proof-of-residency requirements before driving.

facilities.name: Household Electronics Drop-off
facilities.hours: Check Jacksonville solid waste pages for current electronics and specialty recycling rules before visiting.
facilities.fees: Electronics and special-item rules can vary. Confirm current eligibility and item limits before arrival.
not_accepted: Materials outside the posted specialty recycling rules
facilities.rules: Use Jacksonville's official solid waste pages to confirm current electronics drop-off guidance and accepted-item limits before driving.
